name: Tamale Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can black beans (rinsed and drained) OR 1 1/4 cup home cooked black beans
1 can corn (rinsed and drained) OR 1 1/4 cup frozen corn kernels
1 can stewed tomatoes OR 1 can chili tomatoes OR 2 chopped fresh tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté onion and jalapenos in water or broth until softened.
- If a milder flavor is desired, substitute 1/4 cup green peppers.
2. Mix the rest of the ingredients into the skillet with the onion and jalapeno mixture.
3. Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and sprinkle non-fat cheese on top (or mix it in).
4. Bake in the casserole for 30 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit until warmed through and bubbly.
- This recipe is better reheated the next day.
